title: retinodendron moluccanum
intro: Retinodendron moluccanum, also known as the Moluccan red ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against various infections and skin irritations. The health benefits of Retinodendron moluccanum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
